description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Event Details

Date: May 13 (Wednesday)

Meeting Time: 9:45 a.m.

Meeting Place: Agano Station ticket gate

Route: Agano Station → Taira Chestnut Orchard → Higashi-Agano Station → Musashi-Yokote Station (My Goal: approx. 10 kilometers) → Koma Station

Distance: Approx. 14 kilometers

Estimated Duration: Approx. 4 hours 30 minutes

Participation Fee: 200 yen (materials, collected on the day)

What to Bring: Lunch box, drinking water, rain gear, transit IC card, Sugo-Ashi handbook (if you have one)

Registration: Apply to ASA Hanno by May 9 (Saturday). Phone: 042-972-4701, Fax: 042-974-2190

Weather Cancellation Check: If the event is cancelled due to weather or other reasons, check with ASA Hanno after 3 p.m. on the day before.

Other: Please arrange your own insurance.

Inquiries: Onda, 090-2205-8073

Organizer: Hanno Walking Club

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/10588.html
summary: ℹ️ Sugo-Ashi Event – Walk the Hanno Two-Day Agano Course on May 13, 2026 (Wednesday)
